name: pore-analysis
description: Measure porosity, pore size/shape, lattice period and ordering (psi6, Voronoi coordination, radial g(r) and orientational correlation length) from top-view SEM images of porous films such as anodic aluminium oxide. Calibrates from the scale bar, segments pores, outputs a report, figures, and a per-pore CSV. Built-in trust layer refuses to guess — it stops and asks when the scale bar is ambiguous (e.g. a text label plate) or the numbers contradict physics.
